title: rubus × tornaticaulis
intro: Rubus × tornaticaulis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a hybrid plant species in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rubus × tornaticaulis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × tornaticaulis can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
